title: Excluding weekends in formula that counts days since a status changed
excerpt: Hey team, new here but I am using this formula currently ROUND(DAYS({Loan fired to LC},TODAY()),0) but it is counting calendar days, and I just want it to count business days.  I went into the general setting and exclude…

posts.author: neohomeloans (Scott DiGregorio)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey team, new here but I am using this formula currently ROUND(DAYS({Loan fired to LC},TODAY()),0) but it is counting calendar days, and I just want it to count business days. I went into the general setting and excluded weekends there but that didn’t do the trick. How do I modify this formula to only count business days

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Scott,

Simply replace DAYS by WORKDAYS.
